body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201351BB0627437839CB19843D"}"},"total":25},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617777352552989465","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"到我看到现在41章为止，写的真的很好！
日常非常的温馨，战斗的时候也是很热血的感觉，就有种代入感。
而且主角的成长真的会让你有种他真的在修炼，真的在拼命真的想去变强的感觉，不会说像系统文一样莫名其妙的系统颁发个任务，然后给你个奖励，你就突然变得非常非常强，没有那种感觉。你是真的觉得他强是应该的，而不是很虚浮的那一种。
真的，你看完他修炼的那些过程以后，你会觉得他强，真的真的就是这个人应该得到的回报，而不是像系统文一样，你做个任务得个奖励，中间什么伤也没有受什么苦也没有受就变强了，没有那种感觉，或者说有的系统文他想让你变强又想让主角受苦，就会给你安排一些很弱智的情节，但我看到目前为止没有的，你明明前面系统奖励了那么多好东西，但是你就是在需要用的时候突然忘掉，然后后面给你编个理由，就给你一个很弱智的理由让你强行忘掉他，就你看到一半那种人都不想看了，但是主角的变强修炼的过程刻苦的感觉不会让你有那种感觉。
到我看到目前为止，我能给他5星好评。
真的，他变强的那些过程，受的那些苦，光看着我都感觉很难受，因为前面的一些情节真的让我有种把他当成弟弟的感觉。
看着他从丛林里出来，然后慢慢的变得知道人性，知道感情，然后性格慢慢变软，然后又被他的师傅们磨练重新找回野性中间的这些过程。真的，就让你有种看着他慢慢成长，然后把他当成弟弟的那种那种感觉。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773656568,"group_id":"7612039891622317118","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxa+Z9DIOfGmV5RK6HP1vEE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"984779858134526","user_name":"爱吃香酥蛋卷的常勇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"984779858134526","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1729675084,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612039891622317118","book_info":{"abstract":"当所有人靠饥饿、毒素、毛发、声波战斗时，狩走出了独一无二的路。
不被动吞噬，不无限开挂，一切能力全凭主观选择。
亲手狩猎，标记主权，吞噬后只收录最致命的捕食模板；
战斗中唤醒美食恶魔，拟态猛兽捕食器官，以猎物的方式，猎杀更强的猎物。
凯拉巨鳄之颚、撕裂般的突进、碾压级咬合力、本能级预判闪避……
常态冷静制敌，夺食时暴怒无双，能狩猎强敌，能守护食材，更能惩戒一切抢夺者。
没有系统，没有面板，只有最纯粹的美食细胞与野兽本能。
这是一个，以护食为骨、以掠夺为魂、独占食物链顶端的美食猎人传说。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/72a2e0e711c059267b73a8e5f7d61733~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"摆烂仔写书日记","author_id":"","book_id":"7612039891622317118","book_name":"美食猎人狩","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0a878","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612039930566410814","read_count":"20645","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"388173"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"57","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,美食","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/72a2e0e711c059267b73a8e5f7d61733~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365632&x-signature=goPFi3%2BCDD3ryEEZkfUg2qzqjro%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1717853597211740","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"52"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201351BB0627437839CB19843D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11406,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":837},"user_action" 无比推荐！","text_exts":[{"e":11,"s":6,"text":"美食的俘虏","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BE%8E%E9%A3%9F%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%98%E8%99%8F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774181632CB19843D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617848160506118974%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227612039891622317118%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BE%8E%E9%A3%9F%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%98%E8%99%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773670710,"group_id":"7612039891622317118","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9u+pQk/tgPohSaQaymYDCk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8ea926d163f8427383a543a29c51767c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706051&x-signature=cycND%2FFrPDKq1SVzfrWh3k%2FllcI%3D","user_id":"78790849995341","user_name":"来个震慑吧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"78790849995341","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612039891622317118","book_info":{"abstract":"当所有人靠饥饿、毒素、毛发、声波战斗时，狩走出了独一无二的路。
不被动吞噬，不无限开挂，一切能力全凭主观选择。
亲手狩猎，标记主权，吞噬后只收录最致命的捕食模板；
战斗中唤醒美食恶魔，拟态猛兽捕食器官，以猎物的方式，猎杀更强的猎物。
凯拉巨鳄之颚、撕裂般的突进、碾压级咬合力、本能级预判闪避……
常态冷静制敌，夺食时暴怒无双，能狩猎强敌，能守护食材，更能惩戒一切抢夺者。
没有系统，没有面板，只有最纯粹的美食细胞与野兽本能。
这是一个，以护食为骨、以掠夺为魂、独占食物链顶端的美食猎人传说。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/72a2e0e711c059267b73a8e5f7d61733~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"摆烂仔写书日记","author_id":"","book_id":"7612039891622317118","book_name":"美食猎人狩","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0a878","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612039930566410814","read_count":"20645","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"388173"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"57","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,美食","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/72a2e0e711c059267b73a8e5f7d61733~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365632&x-signature=goPFi3%2BCDD3ryEEZkfUg2qzqjro%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1717853597211740","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"20"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201351BB0627437839CB19843D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6182,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":682},"user_action":
